request.description:
## Register User

This endpoint registers a new user in the system. On successful registration, it returns a confirmation message with a `201 Created` status.

---

### Endpoint

**POST** `http://localhost:3000/api/auth/register`

---

### Request Body

Send the request body as **JSON** (`application/json`) with the following fields:

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | String | Yes | The full name of the user. |
| `username` | String | Yes | A unique username for the user's account. |
| `email` | String | Yes | A valid and unique email address for the user. |
| `password` | String | Yes | The account password (e.g., minimum 8 characters, include uppercase, number, and special character). |
| `confirmpassword` | String | Yes | Must match the `password` field exactly. |

**Example Request Body:**

``` json
{
  "name": "John Doe",
  "username": "johndoe",
  "email": "johndoe@example.com",
  "password": "Test@123",
  "confirmpassword": "Test@123"
}

 ```

---

### Response

On success, the endpoint returns an HTTP `201 Created` with the following structure:

**Example Response:**

``` json
{
  "success": true,
  "status": 201,
  "data": "User Successfully register."
}

 ```
### Response

On Error, the endpoint returns an HTTP `400 Bad Request` with the following structure:

**Example Response:**

``` json
{
    "success": false,
    "status": 400,
    "message": "Name must have more than 5 characters"
}

 ```

## Login User

Authenticates an existing user and returns a JWT token that can be used for subsequent authenticated requests.

---

### Request

**Method:** `POST`  
**URL:** `http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login`

#### Request Body

The request body must be sent as **JSON** (`application/json`).

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `email` | `string` | Yes | The registered email of the user |
| `password` | `string` | Yes | The user's account password |

**Example:**

``` json
{
  "email": "patoliya.nk1@gmail.com",
  "password": "Password123"
}

 ```

---

### Response

On success, the endpoint returns an HTTP `200 OK` with the following structure:

**Example Response:**

``` json
{
  "success": true,
  "status": 200,
  "data": {
    "_id": "69b8e2b8b5f3c5cb13a869ef",
    "name": "testUser",
    "username": "test12356",
    "email": "testuser@gmail.com",
    "phone": "",
    "role": "user",
    "isVerify": false,
    "avatar": "",
    "createdAt": "2026-03-17T05:12:24.492Z",
    "updatedAt": "2026-03-17T05:12:24.492Z",
    "__v": 0
  },
  "token": "<JWT token>"
}

 ```

### Response

On Error, the endpoint returns an HTTP `400 Bad Request` with the following structure:

**Example Response:**

``` json
{
    "success": false,
    "status": 400,
    "message": "email or password incorrect."
}

 ```

## Upload / Update User Avatar

Uploads or updates the authenticated user's profile avatar image. The image is stored on **Cloudinary** and the returned user object will contain the new Cloudinary URL in the `avatar` field.

---

### Endpoint

**POST** `http://localhost:3000/api/upload/avatar`

---

### Authentication

This endpoint requires a valid Bearer token passed via the `Authorization` header.

| Header | Value |
| --- | --- |
| `Authorization` | `AuthToken` |

> Set the `AuthToken` variable in your active environment before sending this request. 
  

---

### Request

**Method:** `POST`  
**URL:** `http://localhost:3000/api/upload/avatar`

#### Request Body

The request body must be sent as **JSON** (`application/form-data`).

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `avatar` | `file/image` | Yes | this is image of user |

---

### Response

**Status:** `200 OK`

Returns the updated user object with the new avatar URL.

``` json
{
  "_id": "69b8e2b8b5f3c5cb13a869ef",
  "name": "testUser",
  "username": "test12356",
  "email": "testuser@gmail.com",
  "phone": "",
  "role": "user",
  "isVerify": false,
  "avatar": "http://res.cloudinary.com/dvqs1k61h/image/...",
  "createdAt": "2026-03-17T05:12:24.492Z",
  "updatedAt": "2026-03-17T05:23:38.118Z",
  "__v": 0
}

 ```

### Response

On Error, the endpoint returns an HTTP `400 Bad Request` with the following structure:

**Example Response:**

``` json
{
    "success": false,
    "status": 400,
    "message": "Image not Given."
}

 ```

### Response

On Error, the endpoint returns an HTTP `401 Unauthorized` with the following structure:

**Example Response:**

``` json
{
    "success": false,
    "status": 401,
    "message": "Authorization header missing"
}

 ```

## Create New Post

Creates a new post with a title and description. The post is saved to the database and returned in the response with metadata such as creation timestamps, like count, and publish status.

---

### Endpoint

**POST** `http://localhost:3000/api/post/`

---

### Authentication

This endpoint requires a **Bearer Token** passed via the `Authorization` header.

| Header | Value |
| --- | --- |
| `Authorization` | `AuthToken` |

> Make sure the `AuthToken` variable is set in your active environment before sending the request. 
  

---

### Request Body

The request body must be sent as **raw JSON**.

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `title` | `string` | The title of the post. Uses `{{$randomJobTitle}}` to generate a random job title dynamically. |
| `description` | `string` | A short description of the post. |

**Example:**

``` json
{
  "title": "{{$randomJobTitle}}",
  "description": "test description"
}

 ```

---

### Response

**Status:** `201 Created`

A successful response returns the created post object wrapped in a standard response envelope.

**Example Response:**

``` json
{
  "success": true,
  "status": 200,
  "data": {
    "title": "Legacy Interactions Administrator",
    "description": "test description",
    "image": "",
    "CreatedBy": "69b8e2b8b5f3c5cb13a869ef",
    "likesCount": 0,
    "likes": [],
    "isPublished": false,
    "_id": "69b8e8992cdf646d3433ead1",
    "createdAt": "2026-03-17T05:37:29.410Z",
    "updatedAt": "2026-03-17T05:37:29.410Z",
    "__v": 0
  }
}

 ```

### Response

On Error, the endpoint returns an HTTP `400 Bad Request` with the following structure:

**Example Response:**

``` json
{
    "success": false,
    "status": 400,
    "message": "description must have more than 10 characters"
}

 ```

### Response

On Error, the endpoint returns an HTTP `401 Unauthorized` with the following structure:

**Example Response:**

``` json
{
    "success": false,
    "status": 401,
    "message": "Invalid or expired token"
}

 ```

Get All post

get all post with pagination and filter option in this api have total 5 Params . and this api open for anyone.

---

### Endpoint

**GET** `http://localhost:3000/api/post`

---

### Request Body

The request have 5 Params Options.

| Key | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `userId` | `69b4f9005e7fa1a1f1109635` | this is use for get all post of this user. |
| `page` | `2` | this is give 2ed page of all post page. |
| `limit` | `15` | this params use for limits how many post on one page. |
| `likes` | `5-10` | this params use for get post which likes between 5 to 10. and it formet must be in min-max. |
| `sortBy` | `asc` | use for this Params to get post short by title. asc for A-Z and defalt Z-A |

### Response

**Status:** `200 OK`

A successful response returns the created post object wrapped in a standard response envelope.

**Example Response:**

``` json
{
  "success": true,
  "status": 200,
  "data": {
    "posts": ["Array of post"],
    "total": 40,
    "limit": 12,
    "page": 2,
    "pages": 4
  }
}

 ```

## Get post by id

get post by using post Id. this is dynemic API post id given like Example.

---

### Endpoint

**GET** `http://localhost:3000/api/post/:id`

---

### Response

**Status:** `200 OK`

A successful response returns the created post object wrapped in a standard response envelope.

**Example Response:**

``` json
{
    "success": true,
    "statusCode": 200,
    "data": {
        "image": "",
        "_id": "69b7a5594b32fa68e1f09ea5",
        "title": "Forward Creative Executive",
        "description": "test description",
        "CreatedBy": "69b4f9005e7fa1a1f1109635",
        "likesCount": 1,
        "likes": [
            "69b4f9005e7fa1a1f1109635"
        ],
        "isPublished": false,
        "createdAt": "2026-03-16T06:38:17.391Z",
        "updatedAt": "2026-03-16T11:37:04.528Z",
        "__v": 0
    }
}

 ```    


 ### Response

On Error, the endpoint returns an HTTP `404 Not Found` with the following structure:

**Example Response:**

``` json
{
    "success": false,
    "status": 404,
    "message": "this post id is invalid"
}

 ```

## Get All post

Update post by using post Id. this is dynemic API post id given like Example.

---

### Endpoint

**PUT** `http://localhost:3000/api/post/:id`

---

### Authentication

This endpoint requires a **Bearer Token** passed via the `Authorization` header.

| Header | Value |
| --- | --- |
| `Authorization` | `AuthToken` |

> Make sure the `AuthToken` variable is set in your active environment before sending the request. 
  

---

### Request Body

The request body must be sent as **raw JSON**.

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `title` | `string` | The title of the post. Uses `{{$randomJobTitle}}` to generate a random job title dynamically. |
| `description` | `string` | A short description of the post. |

**Example:**

``` json
{
  "title": "{{$randomJobTitle}}",
  "description": "test description"
}

 ```

---

### Response

**Status:** `200 OK`

A successful response returns the created post object wrapped in a standard response envelope.

**Example Response:**

``` json
{
    "success": true,
    "status": 200,
    "data": {
        "image": "",
        "_id": "69b7a4db4b32fa68e1f09e41",
        "title": "District Security Producer - 2",
        "description": "This is a test description for the District Security Producer - 2. It should be more than 10 characters long.",
        "CreatedBy": "69b4e21497e497f72464f312",
        "likesCount": 0,
        "likes": [],
        "isPublished": false,
        "createdAt": "2026-03-16T06:36:11.196Z",
        "updatedAt": "2026-03-16T10:28:48.319Z",
        "__v": 0
    }
}

 ```

## Error Responce

**Status:** `401 Unauthorized`

when the AuthToken is wrone then give me this Error in reponce.

``` json
{
    "success": false,
    "status": 401,
    "message": "Authorization header missing"
}

 ```

**Status:** `404 Not Found`

when the post id is wrone then give me this Error in reponce.

``` json
{
    "success": false,
    "status": 404,
    "message": "post not found."
}

 ```

## Delete Post

Deletes a specific post by its unique ID. Only authorized users (typically admins or the post owner) can perform this action.

---

### Endpoint

**DELETE** `http://localhost:3000/api/post/:id`

---

---

### Authentication

This endpoint requires a **Bearer Token** passed via the `Authorization` header.

| Header | Value |
| --- | --- |
| `Authorization` | `AuthToken` |

> Make sure the `AuthToken` variable is set in your active environment before sending the request. 
  

---

### Path Parameter

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | string | Yes | The unique MongoDB ObjectID of the post to delete (e.g., `69b0f5150e522a3c613509c3`) |

---

### Response

**Status:** `200 OK`

A successful response returns the created post object wrapped in a standard response envelope.

**Example Response:**

``` json
{
    "success": true,
    "status": 200,
    "data": "post successfully delete."
}

 ```    


 ### Response

On Error, the endpoint returns an HTTP `401 Unauthorized` with the following structure:

**Example Response:**

``` json
{
    "success": false,
    "status": 401,
    "message": "Invalid or expired token"
}

 ```


 ### Response

On Error, the endpoint returns an HTTP `404 Not Found` with the following structure:

**Example Response:**

``` json
{
    "success": false,
    "status": 404,
    "message": "Post not found."
}
 ```

## Upload / Post image

Uploads or updates the authenticated user's created post image. The image is stored on **Cloudinary** and the returned user object will contain the new Cloudinary URL in the `image` field.

---

### Endpoint

**POST** `http://localhost:3000/api/upload/post`

---

### Authentication

This endpoint requires a valid Bearer token passed via the `Authorization` header.

| Header | Value |
| --- | --- |
| `Authorization` | `AuthToken` |

> Set the `AuthToken` variable in your active environment before sending this request. 
  

---

### Request

#### Request Body

The request body must be sent as **JSON** (`application/form-data`).

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `avatar` | `file/image` | Yes | this is image of user |

---

### Response

**Status:** `200 OK`

Returns the updated user object with the new avatar URL.

``` json
{
    "_id": "69b9282da3b48489372ff790",
    "title": "Senior Branding Planner",
    "description": "test description",
    "image": "http://res.cloudinary.com/dvqs1k61h/image/upload/v1773742317/apb5dlg0h5m49vekh4a6.jpg",
    "CreatedBy": "69b4e21497e497f72464f312",
    "likesCount": 0,
    "likes": [],
    "isPublished": false,
    "createdAt": "2026-03-17T10:08:45.626Z",
    "updatedAt": "2026-03-17T10:11:58.387Z",
    "__v": 0
}

 ```

### Response

On Error, the endpoint returns an HTTP `400 Bad Request` with the following structure:

**Example Response:**

``` json
{
    "success": false,
    "status": 400,
    "message": "Image not Given."
}

 ```

### Response

On Error, the endpoint returns an HTTP `401 Unauthorized` with the following structure:

**Example Response:**

``` json
{
    "success": false,
    "status": 401,
    "message": "Authorization header missing"
}

 ```

## API Endpoint: Like a Post

This endpoint allows users to like a specific post identified by its unique ID. By sending a GET request to this endpoint, users can indicate their approval or support for the post.

---

### Endpoint

**GET** `http://localhost:3000/api/post/like/{postId}`

---

### Authentication

This endpoint requires a valid Bearer token passed via the `Authorization` header.

| Header | Value |
| --- | --- |
| `Authorization` | `AuthToken` |

> Set the `AuthToken` variable in your active environment before sending this request. 
  
---

### Response

**Status:** `200 OK`

A successful response returns the created post object wrapped in a standard response envelope.

``` json
{
    "success": true,
    "status": 200,
    "data": "69b9282da3b48489372ff790 likes by you !!"
}

 ```

## Error Responce

**Status:** `401 Unauthorized`

when the AuthToken is wrone then give me this Error in reponce.

``` json
{
    "success": false,
    "status": 401,
    "message": "Authorization header missing"
}

 ```

**Status:** `404 Not Found`

when the post id is wrone then give me this Error in reponce.

``` json
{
    "success": false,
    "status": 404,
    "message": "post not found."
}

## API Endpoint: Like a Post

This endpoint allows users to dislike a specific post identified by its unique ID. By sending a GET request to this endpoint, users can indicate their approval or support for the post.

---

### Endpoint

**GET** `http://localhost:3000/api/post/dislike/{postId}`

---

### Authentication

This endpoint requires a valid Bearer token passed via the `Authorization` header.

| Header | Value |
| --- | --- |
| `Authorization` | `AuthToken` |

> Set the `AuthToken` variable in your active environment before sending this request. 
  
---

### Response

**Status:** `200 OK`

A successful response returns the created post object wrapped in a standard response envelope.

``` json
{
    "success": true,
    "status": 200,
    "data": "remove likes by from  Senior Branding Planner !!"
}

 ```

## Error Responce

**Status:** `401 Unauthorized`

when the AuthToken is wrone then give me this Error in reponce.

``` json
{
    "success": false,
    "status": 401,
    "message": "Authorization header missing"
}

 ```

**Status:** `404 Not Found`

when the post id is wrone then give me this Error in reponce.

``` json
{
    "success": false,
    "status": 404,
    "message": "post not found."
}
